name: instagram-mcp
description: Instagram + Facebook Pages via Graph API: publish, comments, DMs, hashtag search, insights. Multi-account Edge IQ fork with version watchdog.

ig_accounts.title: Accounts JSON
ig_accounts.description: Map of alias -> {user_id, token, fb_page_id?}. Example: {"edgeiq": {"user_id": "17841...", "token": "EAA...", "fb_page_id": "10x..."}}

ig_graph_version.title: Graph API Version
ig_graph_version.description: Override without rebuilding if the default version sunsets (e.g. v22.0)
